content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Review found two correctness gaps: mixed optional-unavailable plus exhausted panel members still fail instead of degrading, and process-backend classification still misses stdout-only quota errors on non-zero exits.

## Amendments

1. Fix the effective-min quorum calculation so it is based on the post-optional-removal participant set, not the original panel length. In src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:434-519, 1498-1535, 1573-1608, 6865-6903, and 7125-7164, `effective_min` is computed from `members.len()` / `panel.*.len()` minus only the exhausted members. That breaks the new degradation path in mixed cases: if an optional reviewer/completer is already omitted for an ordinary availability failure and another remaining backend is `BackendExhausted`, the stage still fails even though the feature is supposed to continue with the remaining available reviewer(s)/completer(s). Base the reduction on `available + exhausted` (the members that would have participated absent exhaustion), and apply the same fix in preflight and resume.
   Rationale: As written, graceful degradation still aborts valid runs whenever exhaustion happens alongside an already-omitted optional backend, so the core feature is incomplete.
2. Classify plain-text stdout quota/usage failures on non-zero exits instead of ignoring them. In src/adapters/process_backend.rs:1448-1465 and 1490-1500, the callers only pass `extract_stdout_error()` output into `classify_exit_failure_with_output`, and src/adapters/process_backend.rs:1915-1918 explicitly documents that raw stdout is not considered. A backend that prints `usage limit`, `quota exceeded`, or similar only to stdout (without a JSON error envelope and with empty stderr) will still be treated as retryable `TransportFailure` instead of terminal `BackendExhausted`.
   Rationale: The bead explicitly requires matching persistent exhaustion patterns from stderr/stdout; the current implementation still misses stdout-only failures and will keep burning retries in that case.
